title: Indie Semiconductor Q1 2026 Topline Analysis
text: Indie Semiconductor is preparing to release Q1 2026 results on May 7, 2026. Company projects revenue between $52-58 million, midpoint $55 million. Core business expected to grow 20% sequentially to ~$34 million. Wuxi Indie Micro subsidiary revenue anticipated at $21 million. Indie announced plans to sell its 34.4% equity stake in Wuxi to United Faith Auto-Engineering for ~$135 million, with closing expected in late 2026. On March 23, 2026, Indie announced the launch of its first ultraviolet laser diode for quantum computing systems, targeting cold-atom quantum applications. Stock has climbed ~30% over the past month and gained over 95% during the preceding 12 months.
